title: US Army's 1st Apache Gunship Crashes Near Hormuz, Both Pilots Rescued
summary_full: The US military has used Apaches, along with MQ-9 Reaper drones and F/A-18 and F-35 fighter jets, as part of Central Command's operation challenging Iran's effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz to most commercial traffic.
